title: DS Nocturne
description: A 1.16.5 Forge Mod that adds vampire abilities to the player and enemies to fight. Currently it is not being worked on...
body:
This is a UNFINISHED project that is as of now not being worked on. I have decided to upload it into Modrinth and will continue to post future projects within this site.


Showcase Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=urAec4P-Zmw 

Version 0.1.0

Current Abilities: 

- Bat Form [BOOST] - You have a swarm of bats following you covering you from the sun. DISABLES ABILITIES Execute abilities with exceptions


- Blood syphon [EXECUTE] - When you shift and melee a creature you steal a bit of their blood 
[when you have syphoned blood they will get an effect "potency" and the next time you hit them they wont give blood. They have a chance to turn into a vampire servant (you wont get blood from this){WIP}]

- Superhuman [PASSIVE] - increases strength speed durability and resistance

- Blood Storage [PASSIVE] - Increases the amount of blood you can store.

Structures 
Fletcher Hut
Butcher Hut
Abandoned Chapel 

Items
Knife (throwable and melee) 2 damage fast attack speed
Vampire totem (wip) when on low health it gives regeneration and temporary invincibility and increases damage of abilities for 10 seconds.
Crystalized Blood, used to obtain power
